subtitle.message: Please sign in to access the ERP system.

accountSecurity.title: Account security
accountSecurity.subtitle: Update your sign-in email, password, or permanently delete your account.
accountSecurity.signed_out: Sign in to manage your account.

email.heading: Email address
email.success: Check your current inbox to approve the change, then verify the new address.
email.invalid: Enter a new email that differs from your current address.
email.help: We email your current address to approve the change, then send verification to the new address.

password.heading: Password
password.revoke_others: Sign out other sessions after change
password.required: Enter your current and new password.

apiKeys.heading: API keys
apiKeys.body: Programmatic access uses Better Auth API keys when enabled for your workspace. Create and revoke keys from your organization or admin settings when available.
apiKeys.hint: Requires the full auth stack (`AFENDA_AUTH_ALL_PLUGINS` not false) and the API key plugin on the server.

delete.heading: Delete account
delete.warning: This permanently removes your sign-in and app access. Some workspace data may be retained under governance policies.
delete.password_help_oauth: If you use Google or another provider only, leave this empty — we will email a confirmation link.
delete.oauth_only: We will email a confirmation link to your address on file.
delete.ack: I understand this account will be permanently deleted.
delete.success: If a confirmation email was required, check your inbox and open the link. Otherwise your session has ended.
delete.need_ack: Confirm that you understand permanent deletion.

experience.methods_body: Availability depends on the methods enabled for this account and the controls your organization has approved.
experience.return_body: Pick up where you left off with the same approved route, whether you return by password, passkey, or link.
experience.controls_body: Recovery, session revocation, and provider changes stay inside governed account controls.
experience.support_body: Every step is designed to be clear for operators, secure for auditors, and easy to recover.
experience.story_intro: Afenda keeps sign-in operational: confirm identity, return to the right workspace, and keep account controls nearby after entry.

verify.title: Verify Through The Approved Route
verify.body: Use the method configured for this account, whether that is password, passkey, email link, or a connected provider.

continue.title: Return To The Working Surface
continue.body: Once access is confirmed, Afenda hands you back to the intended route instead of sending you through a generic detour.

manage.title: Keep Security Controls Close
manage.body: Sessions, providers, recovery, and account changes remain available from settings when your workspace enables them.

experience.feature_intro: The shell is meant to orient, not advertise. It explains the task, shortens recovery, and keeps control surfaces explicit.

clarity.title: Clear Task Framing
clarity.body: Each auth view states what is required, what happens next, and where recovery starts if you need a different route.

continuity.title: Consistent Handoff
continuity.body: Password, passkey, email-link, and provider flows all resolve back into the same workspace entry pattern.

governance.title: Governed Account Changes
governance.body: Linked providers, sessions, passkeys, and destructive actions stay explicit so account changes remain easier to review.

signIn.hero_description: Move from identity check to workspace access in one clear flow built for security-sensitive operations.
signIn.panel_description: Use the approved method for your account. The panel stays focused, traceable, and ready for recovery.

approved.title: Approved Route
approved.body: Use the method already configured for this account.

return.title: Return Fast
return.body: Successful sign-in sends you back to the intended workspace path.

signUp.hero_description: Create access with the same control standards used across the operating workspace.
signUp.panel_description: Set your primary credentials once, then keep recovery and secondary methods available from account settings.

primary.title: Primary Access
primary.body: Create the first credential set for your Afenda account.

recovery.title: Recovery Ready
recovery.body: Add alternate entry methods later from account settings when available.

magicLink.hero_title: Use an Email Link When Speed Matters.
magicLink.hero_description: Send a governed sign-in link to the address on file and continue without handling a permanent secret on this screen.
magicLink.panel_description: We send a one-time link to your inbox and keep the rest of the sign-in surface available if you need another method.

inbox.title: Inbox Entry
inbox.body: Send a one-time link to the address already tied to the account.

fallback.title: Fallback Ready
fallback.body: Password or passkey routes stay available if you switch methods.

forgotPassword.hero_description: Reset password access through a short recovery step designed for fast return and clear confirmation.
forgotPassword.panel_description: Enter the address tied to your account. If it exists, recovery instructions arrive there shortly.

start.title: Start Recovery
start.body: Enter the account address and let the reset route continue from email.

resume.title: Resume Quickly
resume.body: After recovery, return through the normal sign-in route.

resetPassword.hero_description: Choose a replacement password, confirm it once, and return to the workspace through the normal sign-in path.
resetPassword.panel_description: Use a strong replacement password and confirm it inline before the credential is updated.

replace.title: Replace The Secret
replace.body: Set one new password and confirm it inline before update.

reentry.title: Re-enter Normally
reentry.body: Once the reset completes, continue through the standard sign-in path.

signOut.hero_description: Afenda clears the current session and returns you to a safe re-entry point for the next sign-in.
signOut.panel_description: We are ending the current session and redirecting you to the secure sign-in entry.

close.title: End This Session
close.body: Close the current session without changing the account itself.

return.title: Leave A Safe Return
return.body: Afenda sends you back to a secure re-entry point for the next sign-in.

account.title: Account Preferences
account.description: Manage the identity details people see, the address used for sign-in, visual preferences, and session continuity.
account.summary: Profile, email, and workspace continuity controls stay together so routine updates are quick to review.

security.title: Security & Sessions
security.description: Review passwords, linked providers, passkeys, active sessions, and destructive actions from one governed surface.
security.summary: Security controls stay explicit, reversible where possible, and easy to audit across devices and providers.

empty.passkeys_body: Add a passkey to shorten future sign-ins and keep a device-bound recovery option available.
empty.sessions_body: When a session is active, Afenda lists it here so you can review trust and revoke access when needed.

shell.label: Setup
shell.footer: Complete the required account state, then continue into the app.

workspace.title: Set Your Workspace Context
workspace.description: Create the first workspace or reactivate an existing one. Afenda uses this binding as the required operating context for the app.
workspace.account_description: Confirm the identity that will own the first workspace binding.
workspace.binding_description: The first workspace becomes the active organization context for subsequent app entry.
workspace.create_description: Use a clear internal name. Afenda derives the routing slug automatically.
workspace.name_help: Use the operational name your team will recognize.
workspace.resume_description: If your account already belongs to a workspace, activate it and continue.

errors.name_taken: That workspace name is already in use. Try a more specific name.

profile.title: Review Your Profile
profile.description: Add the identity details your teammates will see. This step is recommended, not required, before app entry.
profile.next_description: {{organization}} is ready. Continue to the app now or refine your account details first.
